description: §16.2 Workflow-tier dashboard 5/5 (final) — Outbox + Activepieces dispatch lag. Reads from the Phase 0 outbox layer (database/raw/phase0/40-layer-d-outbox.sql) plus the Activepieces queue depth. Source of the §16.5 unified `workflow.workflow_runs` view.

panels.title: Outbox rows pending by topic
panels.description: Phase 0 outbox.events. unsent_at IS NULL = pending. Sustained > 0 on any topic means the downstream consumer (Activepieces flow, audit ledger ingester) is offline or slow.

panels.title: Outbox dispatch latency p95 (s)
panels.description: outbox.events.sent_at - inserted_at. Healthy: < 5s. > 30s sustained = consumer is overloaded.

panels.title: Activepieces flow execution rate (req/s)
panels.description: Per-flow run rate. The notification + audit-attach + Slack-notify flows dominate today.

panels.title: Activepieces flow error rate (%)
panels.description: Per-flow failure rate. Sustained > 5% on any single flow is alert-worthy.

panels.title: Audit ledger anchor rate (events/min)
panels.description: audit.audit_ledger row insert rate broken down by action_type. Confirms the §10.6 nightly eval cron, §10.9 support agents, §G.2 restore_workspace and §G.1 targeting all writing their audit anchors. Sustained 0 = an upstream emit path is broken.

panels.title: Audit hash-chain integrity
panels.description: audit.audit_ledger hash-chain trigger validates each row's prev_hash matches the previous row's hash. 1 = chain intact, 0 = tamper detected (PagerDuty incident).

panels.title: Eval regression alarms last 24h
panels.description: Phase 175 — `eval.regression_detected` rows in audit.audit_ledger. Should be 0 unless a real promotion-gate regression hit. Each one needs cockpit triage.

panels.title: Activepieces backlog (queued executions)
panels.description: Current queued executions across all Activepieces flows. Sustained growth = worker can't keep up; scale activepieces-worker.

panels.title: Pulse queue depth (Laravel)
panels.description: Laravel Horizon queue + Pulse counters. Sustained > 0 = Horizon worker is offline or the queue is being overrun.

title: GeoRAG — Workflows (Outbox + Activepieces)
